label: 第133話
source_locator: 単行本15巻 目次 p.173
summary_short: 夏油の肉体を持つ術師は真人を取り込み、虎杖の前へ立つ。渋谷各地にいた術師たちも集結し、戦いの構図が大きく変わる。
summary_full: 東堂と新田新が渋谷へ到着した経緯、パンダが隕の瓦礫から日下部を救出したこと、冥冥と憂憂が術式でクアラルンプールへ脱出したことが示される。羂索は虎杖に対し、複数の呪霊を連続して使える呪霊操術の強みを実演する。真人は羂索へ襲いかかろうとするが捕らえられ、黒い球へ変換されて呪霊操術に取り込まれる。羂索は真人を手中に収め、虎杖へこれからの世界について話そうとする。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: The 渋谷事変 races towards its conclusion as several different groups of jujutsu sorcerers prepare for what comes next. Meanwhile, 悠仁 's victory over 真人 is short-lived as the two are confronted by the mastermind behind everything.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: パンダ searching through the wreckage of a completely decimated 渋谷. When 東堂葵 and 新田新 first arrived in 渋谷 at 11:09 PM, they headed straight for the 副都心線 ホーム where 五条悟 was sealed. They ran into a group of paralyzed non-sorcerers still left in a trance from being exposed to 無量空処 . 東堂 arrived at the spot where 獄門疆 dented the ground upon initially processing 悟 and confirmed the 呪物 had been moved. 新 was discouraged by the direness of the situation but 東堂 told him they need to keep moving. Their goal shifted from retrieving 悟 to rescuing as many of their fellow sorcerers as possible. Feeling that his best friend was nearby, 東堂 told 新 they needed to hurry. At 11:28 PM, パンダ used his ゴリラモード to search the wreckage of the area in front of 渋谷ストリーム following 極ノ番「隕」 's impact. He moved enough rubble to eventually located 日下部 . He was slightly injured and trapped under the rubble, but nothing life threatening. Having nearly been killed by 宿儺 's rampage, 日下部 told パンダ that 悠仁 isn't like he was told. パンダ tried to explain that it was 宿儺 who attacked them and not 悠仁 but 日下部 doesn't accept that as a reason. He claims if 五条 disappears then he won't stand on 悠仁's side against the higher-ups as his students would've hoped. 日下部 agrees that 悠仁 should be executed. " Shall I save you... 真人? " At 10:36 PM in マレーシア・クアラルンプール, 冥冥 teased 憂憂 about sharing the same bed until someone gave her a callback. She revealed to that person that she was nearly killed by Pseudo-夏油 and had to escape using 憂憂's innate technique . She advised them to sell all their Japanese stock and 東京 real estate immediately. Having already exchanged her yen, 冥冥 expects a possible negative chain reaction could still affect other nearby developed nations. Japan's economy is the third-largest in the world and could be in for a major decline. 冥冥 shares this information so she can use it as a favor in future businesses endeavors. Around the same time, パンダ located 日下部, 脹相 was continuing to have flashbacks of 悠仁 in his life alongside his other brothers. In BF3 of 渋谷駅, 脹相 was sitting down leaning up against a door in a depressed position. After shedding a tear for his brothers, 脹相 decided he needed to move. Unsure of himself, 脹相 needs to know what 悠仁 is. 悠仁 overwhelmed by the strengths 呪霊 manipulation provides its user. 11:36 PM at present, 夏油 asks 真人 if he needs saving. 悠仁 acts quickly, recognizing 夏油's name and appearance with the descriptions of 悟's captor. He demands 五条 back rushes towards the 呪詛師 . 夏油 nonchalantly explains that people of the mid-edo period connection spoke of a mysterious connection between catfish and earthquakes. At the same time, he summons a small catfish 呪霊 that swims into the ground. Suddenly, a gigantic hole created by the curse appears underneath 悠仁. The first-year loses his balance and appears to fall into the hole. However, 悠仁 abruptly falls to the ground as if the hole never existed, completely dazing him. 夏油 asks if 悠仁 believed he had fallen and says from a side view, it just looked like he suddenly flipped over. 夏油 explains the strength of 呪霊操術 lies in the high number of moves at the user's disposal. By wielding multiple 呪霊 of semi-grade 1 and higher, 夏油 can unleash different types of attacks every time his opponent adjusts to one. 夏油 doesn't even have to allow time for his opponents to overcome his techniques and can just pile on the different attacks. " Let us discuss the world to come. " 夏油 demonstrates this on 悠仁, using a curse that takes the form of a swarm of centipedes crawling out of a black webbing to ensnare 悠仁. Then the catfish curse opens another hole at the same time, suspending 悠仁 in the air without balance before stacking another centipede attack and smashing the sorcerer into the ground with great force. Pseudo-夏油 believes that 傑 would've defeated 乙骨憂太 if his 呪霊 weren't divided for the Night Parade of a Hundred Demons . As 悠仁 lays on his hands and knees bloodied from the attack, 夏油 realizes that the first-year had nothing to do with that event. 悠仁 simply demands 悟 back and Pseudo-夏油 laughs in response while admitting that 宿儺's vessel is tough. 真人 desperately attempts to attack Pseudo-夏油 from behind, but to no avail. The 呪霊 admits he knew 夏油's true plans for him all along since he was born of humans. 夏油 absorbs 真人 as the 呪霊 utters his final words. After condensing 真人 into a black sphere, 夏油 asks 悠仁 to continue discussing the future of the jujutsu world.

key_events_verified_phase7: 東堂と新田新が五条の封印地点を確認していたことが示される
パンダが瓦礫から日下部を救出する
冥冥と憂憂が海外へ脱出していたことが示される
羂索が呪霊操術で虎杖を圧倒する
羂索が真人を呪霊操術で取り込む
verification_notes_phase7: 集英社公式14～16巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第七段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
